update.releaseNotes:
v5.6.1 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Note that `armeabi-v7a` has been dropped in favor of `x86_64`. Installing this variant on x86 devices results in a significant performance boost. You may need to increase `Wait Delay` setting since the bot will now be going super fast in order to avoid issues because of it.
Adjustments --- - Relax Trackblazer Glow Sticks conservation so the bot is willing to use them on top-tier G1 races instead of hoarding for later turns. - Speed/Wit trainings will now no longer be forcibly picked if failure is high with no Good-Luck Charm available and will fall back to resting instead.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where long page titles in the frontend were overflowing off the right edge on narrow phones. - Fix bug where a conflict with healing at the Infirmary caused the date in memory to be stale. - Fix bug where the Trackblazer Megaphone duration counter was not decremented after completing a mandatory race, causing the buff timer to drift.
